SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class MultiVesselBlowdownStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.MultiVesselBlowdownStudy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MultiVesselBlowdownStudy extends Object implements Serializable
Coupled simultaneous blowdown of multiple vessels into a shared flare/disposal header per API 521 §7.

Each registered source is blown down (or supplied as a pre-computed DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult) and the instantaneous discharge mass flows are superimposed on a common time grid to build the combined relief load profile seen by the flare header. The study reports:

  • Peak total mass flow and the time at which it occurs (the controlling load case for header sizing)
  • Header gas velocity and Mach number at the peak (API 521 §7 / NORSOK P-002 limit, default 0.7)
  • Per-source contribution to the peak load

References: API STD 521 (7th Ed) §7 Disposal Systems, NORSOK P-002 (flare/blowdown line velocity criteria).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • MultiVesselBlowdownStudy

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy()

  • Method Details

    • addSource

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy addSource(String name, DepressurizationSimulator simulator)
      Register a vessel by its configured depressurization simulator. The simulator is run when run() is called.
      Parameters:
      name - unique source name
      simulator - configured depressurization simulator
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • addSourceResult

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy addSourceResult(String name, DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult result)
      Register a vessel by a pre-computed depressurization result (avoids re-running the transient).
      Parameters:
      name - unique source name
      result - a completed depressurization result
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • setHeader

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy setHeader(double diameterM, double pressureBara, double temperatureK, double molarMassKgPerMol, double gamma)
      Configure the flare header geometry and gas state used for the Mach check at the peak load.
      Parameters:
      diameterM - header internal diameter in m
      pressureBara - header absolute pressure in bara
      temperatureK - header gas temperature in K
      molarMassKgPerMol - average gas molar mass in kg/mol
      gamma - gas isentropic exponent (Cp/Cv)
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • setMaxAllowableMach

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy setMaxAllowableMach(double mach)
      Set the maximum allowable header Mach number (default 0.70 per API 521 / NORSOK P-002).
      Parameters:
      mach - maximum allowable Mach number
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • setGridStep

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy setGridStep(double dt)
      Set the common time-grid step used to superimpose source profiles (default 1 s).
      Parameters:
      dt - grid step in s
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • run

      public MultiVesselBlowdownStudy.MultiVesselBlowdownResult run()
      Run all sources and build the combined flare load profile.
      Returns:
      the aggregated multi-vessel blowdown result

    • interpolateMassFlow

      private double interpolateMassFlow(DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult r, double t)
      Step-linear interpolation of a source's discharge mass flow at the given time. Returns 0 outside the source's own time window (a source that has finished blowing down no longer contributes).
      Parameters:
      r - the source result
      t - the query time in s
      Returns:
      interpolated mass flow in kg/s
